name: @forwardimpact/svcgraph
description: RDF knowledge graph over gRPC — relationship queries without each product standing up its own store.
author: D. Olsson <hi@senzilla.io>

jobs.trigger: Needing to know how two concepts relate and realizing the answer is scattered across files no one wants to join by hand.
jobs.bigHire: traverse a knowledge graph from a product without standing up my own store.
jobs.littleHire: answer relationship questions without writing join logic.
jobs.competesWith: ad-hoc joins across flat files; embedding a triple store in each product; skipping the relationship question entirely
